description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Where a Process Definition has more than one set of `Required Outputs`, with each set corresponding to (or "triggered by") a particular Input stage, the `Required Primitive Inputs` schema component must explicitly correlate each Input stage with the `Required Outputs` it triggers. See [A.2.
.2.4.1 - Multiple Required Outputs And Their Respective Input Stage or Mutually Exclusive Pathway](10c53693-4784-40ad-a8c6-fd2551f14280).
